articles.author: cna lifestyle
articles.title: Co-star says actor Sam Neill battled pneumonia before death
articles.description: Neill died on Monday (Jul 13) his family said in a statement that described the loss as "sudden and unexpected". His family did not mention cause of death but added that he was cancer free.

articles.author: binu mathew
articles.title: From AI to 6G: What’s on agenda for Piyush Goyal’s key five-day visit to Europe
articles.description: Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal began a five-day visit to Spain, Belgium and Finland on July 13 (Monday). The tour is aimed at deepening trade, investment and technology ties as India and the European Union enter the final stretch of their long-pending free trade agreement. The visit comes days after India and the 27-member EU announced the conclusion of FTA negotiations. The two sides are now conducting legal scrubbing of the text ahead of formal signing, according to the Commerce and Industry Ministry. Goyal is leading a high-level business delegation drawn from advanced manufacturing,

articles.author: moneycontrol world desk
articles.title: Iran claims to down US MQ-1 drone over Hormuz as Trump says blockade targets only Iran
articles.description: Iran claims it shot down a US MQ-1 drone over the Strait of Hormuz as Trump announces an Iran-focused naval blockade and fresh strikes intensify tensions between Washington and Tehran.

articles.title: Will Mbappe miss FIFA world cup semi-final against Spain? Coach clarifies
articles.description: France coach Didier Deschamps provides an update on Kylian Mbappe ahead of their FIFA World Cup semi-final against Spain.

articles.title: SAD Leader Sukhbir Singh Badal's Aide Shot By Unidentified Assailant In Punjab
articles.description: The victim, Kala Jabandha, was at his shop in Bareta town when the attacker arrived and opened fire.

articles.author: dhaval
articles.title: Upbit Trading Volume Explodes 1,319% to $4.2 Billion as South Korean Investors Rotate Out of Stocks
articles.description: BitcoinWorld Upbit Trading Volume Explodes 1,319% to $4.2 Billion as South Korean Investors Rotate Out of Stocks Trading volume on Upbit, South Korea’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, surged approximately 1,318.8% in the last 24 hours to reach roughly $4.243 billion, according to data from CoinGecko. The dramatic spike has prompted speculation that South Korean retail investors are rotating capital back into digital assets as the domestic stock market continues to decline. Volume Spike [...] This post Upbit Trading Volume Explodes 1,319% to $4.2 Billion as South Korean Investors Rotate Out of Stocks first appeared on BitcoinWorld .

articles.author: vinay dalvi
articles.title: Manager siphons off 6.1kg gold from jewellery firm
articles.description: According to the police, complainant Vinit Ranawat, 47, owns Sanghavi Dhanrupji Devaji and Company, a gold and silver jewellery business based in Dagina Bazaar. The accused, Mitesh Kothari, had been working as the firm’s manager for the past 15 years. His uncle, Narendra Kothari, was previously employed by the company as an accountant.

articles.author: vaishnavi gavankar
articles.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah asks fans to create jokes and funny poems ahead of 18th anniversary
articles.description: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is gearing up to celebrate its 18th anniversary with a special initiative for fans. The makers have invited viewers to share creative jokes, funny poems, and light-hearted content to spread laughter as part of the milestone celebrations.
